**Blackbox of the ECDL**
**Input:**

- high speed frequency modulation port (-> frequency looking)
- current $I$
- temperature $T$



**Output:**

- coherence length $>100\text{m}$
- line width $<1\text{MHz}$
- tuning to "several 10's of $\text{nm}$ (so $\textm\text{GHz}$) without realignment"
- tuning of 10's of $\text{GHz}$
- elliptical beam crosssecton (3:1)
  - "amorphic prism pair" can  reshape the crosssection
- collimated beam
